categories.name: Mixed-Integer Programming
categories.description: General-purpose MIP benchmark instances for testing solvers and algorithms

benchmarks.name: MIPLIB 2017
benchmarks.description: The standard benchmark library for MIP solvers. Contains 1,065 instances contributed by the community, with 240 in the benchmark set.

categories.name: Vehicle Routing
categories.description: Benchmark instances for variants of the Vehicle Routing Problem

benchmarks.name: CVRPLIB
benchmarks.description: The main benchmark set for CVRP, including instances from Augerat, Christofides-Mingozzi-Toth, and the X instances by Uchoa et al. (2017).

benchmarks.name: Solomon VRPTW Instances
benchmarks.full_name: Solomon's Vehicle Routing Problems with Time Windows
benchmarks.description: 56 instances with 100 customers for VRPTW, organized in 6 classes (C1, C2, R1, R2, RC1, RC2) based on customer distribution and time window characteristics.

benchmarks.name: Gehring-Homberger Extended Instances
benchmarks.description: Extended Solomon-type instances with 200, 400, 600, 800, and 1000 customers.

categories.name: Scheduling
categories.description: Benchmark instances for scheduling problems (RCPSP, job shop, flow shop)

benchmarks.name: PSPLIB
benchmarks.description: Standard benchmark for RCPSP (Resource-Constrained Project Scheduling Problem). Includes J30, J60, J90, J120 instance sets.

benchmarks.name: Taillard's Instances
benchmarks.description: Widely-used instances for job shop, flow shop, and open shop scheduling problems.

categories.name: Network Optimization
categories.description: Benchmark instances for network design, flow, and routing problems

benchmarks.name: TSPLIB
benchmarks.description: The classic benchmark for TSP and related problems. Contains symmetric/asymmetric TSP, HCP, SOP, and CVRP instances.

benchmarks.name: SNDlib
benchmarks.description: Benchmark instances for survivable network design problems, based on real telecommunication networks.

categories.name: Facility Location
categories.description: Benchmark instances for facility location and p-median problems

benchmarks.name: OR-Library (Facility Location)
benchmarks.description: Benchmark instances for capacitated and uncapacitated facility location, p-median, and set covering problems.

categories.name: Satisfiability & Constraint Programming
categories.description: Benchmark instances for SAT solvers and CP systems

benchmarks.name: SAT Competition Benchmarks
benchmarks.description: Annual competition benchmarks for SAT solvers, including crafted, random, and application instances.

benchmarks.name: MiniZinc Challenge Instances
benchmarks.description: Annual benchmark for constraint programming solvers using the MiniZinc modeling language.

categories.name: Mittelmann Benchmarks (Meta)
categories.description: Independent benchmark suite — the most cited independent benchmark source in OR

benchmarks.name: Hans Mittelmann's Benchmarks
benchmarks.full_name: Mittelmann Decision Tree for Optimization Software
benchmarks.description: Independent benchmark suite run by Hans Mittelmann at ASU. Tests LP, MIP, and other solvers on standardized instance sets. The most cited independent benchmark source in OR.
benchmarks.solver_notes: Gurobi withdrew Aug 2024. MindOpt withdrew Dec 2024. Results updated periodically.
